notes:
## 2.6.1

## What's new

- **Setup welcome** — cleaner first screen: “Get your time back,” two clear choices (child / self), less clutter.
- **Email codes only** — Send code shows “Sending…” then “check your email.” Steady no longer prints the code on the phone or website.
- **No parent-phone fingerprint** — Android fingerprint/face for a parent phone is removed. Use Ask from parent (website) or Steady Face in-app.

_Hard-refresh the dashboard after deploy. Install on new setups especially._
